data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs focus on minimizing the time to acquire digital targets for users.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes well-sized buttons and intuitive navigation paths.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces cognitive load by limiting available options at any given step.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interface with prioritized content areas and progressive disclosure.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Considers the limits of short-term memory in its user interface design.
data.technical_spec: Groups information logically and uses chunking to improve retention and recall.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adopts familiar design patterns that users expect from similar interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of design patterns found in other popular apps to speed up user adaptation.

data.title: Tesler's Law
data.description: Balances simplicity with functionality to avoid unnecessary complexity.
data.technical_spec: Integrates automated workflows and defaults to minimize user decision points.
